title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services!
